name: orchestrator-agent
description: Discovers specialist agents via A2A Agent Cards, calls them with structured JSON envelopes, and fuses their outputs into a single recommendation.

skills.name: Cross-Agent Recommendation
skills.description: Takes a user question, queries SMILE and case-study specialists, and returns merged actions with traceable evidence.
examples: How should a healthcare startup begin a digital twin rollout?
Give me an implementation strategy for smart manufacturing twins.

_lpiMetadata.explainability: Returns specialist evidence snippets and tool provenance in structured response fields.
